languages.text: Вы принудили Декабалуса отдать вам анкер-ядро, уничтожив станцию и всех ее обитателей.

traits.locale_text: Вы принудили Декабалуса отдать вам анкер-ядро, уничтожив станцию и всех ее обитателей.

languages.text: You forced Decabalus to give you the anchor-core, destroying the station and all its inhabitants.
languages.original_text: Вы принудили Декабалуса отдать вам анкер-ядро, уничтожив станцию и всех ее обитателей.

traits.locale_text: You forced Decabalus to give you the anchor-core, destroying the station and all its inhabitants.
You forced Decabalus to give you the anchor-core, destroying the station and all its inhabitants.
You forced Decabalus to give you the anchor-core, destroying the station and all its inhabitants.

languages.text: あなたはデカバルスにアンカーコアを奪い、その結果、ステーションとそこに住む人々を全滅させた。
languages.original_text: You forced Decabalus to give you the anchor-core, destroying the station and all its inhabitants.

traits.locale_text: あなたはデカバルスにアンカーコアを奪い、その結果、ステーションとそこに住む人々を全滅させた。

languages.text: Decabalus'u çapa çekirdeğini sana vermeye zorlayarak istasyonu ve tüm sakinlerini yok ettin.
languages.original_text: You forced Decabalus to give you the anchor-core, destroying the station and all its inhabitants.

traits.locale_text: Decabalus'u çapa çekirdeğini sana vermeye zorlayarak istasyonu ve tüm sakinlerini yok ettin.

languages.text: Obligaste a Decabalus a que te diera el núcleo de anclaje, lo que supuso la destrucción de la estación y de todos sus habitantes.
languages.original_text: You forced Decabalus to give you the anchor-core, destroying the station and all its inhabitants.

traits.locale_text: Obligaste a Decabalus a que te diera el núcleo de anclaje, lo que supuso la destrucción de la estación y de todos sus habitantes.

languages.text: 你迫使德卡巴洛斯交出锚核，导致星站连同其所有生灵尽数毁灭。
languages.original_text: You forced Decabalus to give you the anchor-core, destroying the station and all its inhabitants.

traits.locale_text: 你迫使德卡巴洛斯交出锚核，导致星站连同其所有生灵尽数毁灭。

languages.text: Vous avez obligé Décabalus à vous remettre le noyau ancestral, condamnant ainsi la station et tous ses occupants.
languages.original_text: You forced Decabalus to give you the anchor-core, destroying the station and all its inhabitants.

traits.locale_text: Vous avez obligé Décabalus à vous remettre le noyau ancestral, condamnant ainsi la station et tous ses occupants.

languages.text: Du hast Decabalus gezwungen, dir den Ankerkern zu geben, und damit die Zerstörung der Station und aller ihrer Bewohner besiegelt.
languages.original_text: You forced Decabalus to give you the anchor-core, destroying the station and all its inhabitants.

traits.locale_text: Du hast Decabalus gezwungen, dir den Ankerkern zu geben, und damit die Zerstörung der Station und aller ihrer Bewohner besiegelt.
